name: entity-data-panel
description: Create EntityDataPanel component - tabbed viewer showing Requirements, Findings, Tasks, Decisions for selected session with polling refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts sessionId prop to filter entities
Tabbed interface: Requirements, Findings, Tasks, Decisions, Integration Points
Uses mcpService.callTool to fetch data from platform-features schema
Implements polling with setInterval (configurable, default 5 seconds)
Entity rows are expandable to show full details
